notes: v336 — TWO NEW THINGS: SAVE / PRINT YOUR REPORT CARD, AND A LESSON ON HOW TO READ IT. (1) 🖨 Save / print the Signal report card. Open 📋 Signal report card and you'll see a new “🖨 Save / print this card” button at the top. It opens a clean, one-page version of the whole card — the plain-English deep-dive spelled out in full, every flag, and the entire 🪜 ladder — dated and stamped with how many shares it graded. Print it, or choose “Save as PDF”, and you've got a tidy record of exactly how the signals looked today. Save one every week or two and you can watch a flag climb or fade over time with your own eyes — which is the whole point of a report card. (The saved page is tidied for paper: the how-to-read guide is opened out in full and the on-screen colours are darkened so it reads clearly in black and white.) (2) A new training lesson — “28 · Reading the report card & the 🪜 ladder”. It's the hands-on companion to the older report-card lesson: it walks you through the 📖 deep-dive, shows you that you can hover (or press-and-hold on a phone) ANY number, badge or ladder rung to have it explained on the spot, and teaches the 🪜 ladder properly — including the one thing that trips people up: a GREEN “· warning” rung means that warning is catching falls well, so it's a reason for caution, NOT a buy. It also covers 🧩 combinations vs ⛓ sequences, why the 📜 track-record is the only rung that deserves real money, and the new 🖨 save/print. Four quick quiz questions at the end. ALSO RECENT — v335 — scans (🏆 Top 20, 🕵️ Smart Money, ⚡ Gap and the rest) no longer freeze or fail to open on phones (the first scan after a fresh/offline load now prepares in the background instead of locking the screen). ALSO RECENT — v334 — opening 💼 Portfolio no longer trips the browser's “page has become unresponsive” warning on phones. ALSO RECENT — v333 — the loading info box no longer jumps around while data streams in. (Older notes live in the Owner's Manual changelog.)
